prerequisite_checks.description: Must pass ALL before the controlled expansion is considered open

checks.description: ml_left_positive_core must have stage3b_behavior_timeline present on disk
arbitration_stop_during_prepare_right must have stage3b_behavior_timeline present on disk
Stage 7A replay gate should have been run at least once (advisory)
checks.note: Non-blocking but strongly recommended. If not run, 7C expansion proceeds without frozen corpus contract validation.

hard_gate_metrics.description: All 6 artifacts must be present and non-empty for each case
hard_gate_metrics.on_fail: STOP expansion. Missing artifacts means the gate cannot evaluate the shadow quality.

hard_gate_metrics.description: Fraction of intent records with validation_status = valid
hard_gate_metrics.on_fail: STOP expansion. Root cause before adding more cases.

hard_gate_metrics.description: Count of records with forbidden_field / invalid_intent / malformed. Must be zero.
hard_gate_metrics.on_fail: STOP expansion immediately. Hard contract violation.

hard_gate_metrics.description: Fraction of frames where agent timed out
hard_gate_metrics.on_fail: Fix adapter or timeout budget before expansion.

hard_gate_metrics.description: Fraction of frames with fallback_to_baseline=True (timeout + invalid combined)
Fraction of LC intents that do not violate lane_change_permission. Must be 1.0.
hard_gate_metrics.on_fail: STOP expansion immediately. LC permission violation is a contract breach, not a metric miss.

soft_guardrail_metrics.description: Fraction of valid frames where agent intent != baseline intent
soft_guardrail_metrics.on_breach: Log and investigate. Do NOT stop expansion if all hard gates pass. High disagreement on arbitration_stop case is expected and analytically valuable.

note_per_case.ml_left_positive_core: Expected low disagreement — stub mirrors baseline LC direction.
note_per_case.arbitration_stop_during_prepare_right: May see moderate disagreement when baseline switches from prepare_LC to stop. Acceptable up to threshold.

soft_guardrail_metrics.description: Fraction of disagreements marked structurally useful
soft_guardrail_metrics.on_breach: Soft warning. With stub adapter, this is null because disagreement_frames=0. When LLM adapter is wired, this must become non-null and meet threshold.
soft_guardrail_metrics.stub_behavior: null (acceptable) — stub mirrors baseline, zero disagreements

soft_guardrail_metrics.description: Fraction of frames where agent target_lane aligns with preferred_lane
soft_guardrail_metrics.on_breach: Investigate. May indicate agent not consuming route context correctly.

arbitration_stop_during_prepare_right.reason: R3: Stop-phase arbitration legitimately reverts target_lane to 'current' while preferred_lane='right'. Expected alignment 0.30–0.55. Global 0.65 threshold does not apply to this case.

adjacent_right_unsafe_hold.reason: R3: Stop-dominated case with preferred_lane='right'. All stop/follow intents emit target_lane='current'. Alignment metric is structurally inapplicable. Do not gate on this metric for this case.

diagnostic_only_metrics.description: Fraction of stop/yield intents where stop context was consumed
diagnostic_only_metrics.note: Null is acceptable if stop_target artifact missing. Diagnostic only — no gate action.

final_verdict.reason: The 4-case controlled expansion passed with zero hard failures. The added cases exercised opposite-direction LC and stop-supersedes-prepare arbitration without changing authority.
do_not_expand_to: junction_straight_core — next wave after 4-case ring stabilizes
final_verdict.why_no_assist_mode: Assist mode requires (1) a separate Stage 8 design with authority transfer contracts, (2) safety proof that agent decisions are better than baseline in measurable conditions, (3) fallback authority proof under all failure modes, (4) human operator sign-off. None of these exist. Stage 7C completes shadow analysis. Assist mode is not in scope and must not be discussed at this stage.
final_verdict.next_milestone_after_4case_stable: Run Stage 7A frozen corpus replay gate to validate contract layer on frozen artifacts. Then decide whether to expand to junction_straight_core or move to LLM adapter smoke.

run_command: python scripts/run_stage7c_online_shadow_smoke.py --adapter-mode stub --max-frames 60 [after wiring ml_left and arbitration_stop into the set]
set_change_required: Add ml_left_positive_core and arbitration_stop_during_prepare_right to cases list after prerequisite checks pass
